title: Why Taiwan is a central issue at the summit between China and the United States: “Trump worries the Taiwanese”

news.title: Why Taiwan is a central issue at the summit between China and the United States: “Trump worries the Taiwanese”

world.title: Why Taiwan is a central issue at the summit between China and the United States: “Trump worries the Taiwanese”

visualIntent.valueStructure: warm red orange left pressure, cool blue cyan right pressure, black central interruption, yellow diagonal Trump pressure cue

contrast.target: separate central black interruption, cyan compression island, yellow pressure struts, and repeated contour bands without glossy effects

workshopAcceptance: Preview attempt 1 succeeded with Playwright desktop screenshot at previews/attempt-001/001-world-environment-draft-desktop.jpg and render report at previews/attempt-001/desktop-render-report.json.

Screenshot shows a dominant full-surround hard-edged geometric environment with warm left field, cool right field, black anchors, yellow/red diagonal pressure struts, cropped radial rings, contour lines, and matte pigment grain.
Self-review confirms the runtime path creates one true enclosing skybox shell only: single-hudson-taiwan-pressure-skybox-shell.
evidence.selfReview: Accepted: the environment is a dominant single-shell Bryce Hudson skybox with non-literal summit/Taiwan fracture pressure and preview-proven readability.
compositionAdaptations: Kept at scene origin as the only authored skybox shell and tuned world fog/radius so the hard-edge environment remains a surrounding field instead of competing with the central subject.
composition modified world-environment from isolated accepted-part defaults
Kept as the single authored surrounding skybox at origin; adjusted world fog/radius and grade so the red-blue-black-yellow hard-edge field supports the central fracture.

workshopAcceptance: Attempt 3 Playwright preview captured desktop screenshot at previews/attempt-003/003-non-literal-fracture-pressure-draft-desktop.jpg.

Screenshot shows a large central hard-edge fracture construction: warm red/orange pressure from the left, cool blue/cyan pressure from the right, a heavy black vertical interruption, yellow diagonal Trump-pressure cue, central cyan compression island, cropped radial arcs, and repeated narrow contour bands.
Visual punch was revised larger after attempt 2; attempt 3 foregroundOccupancyRatio improved to 0.156039 and centerForegroundRatio to 0.476994 while preserving deterministic capture health.
evidence.selfReview: Accepted: the final draft is a visible primary-news-signal module that uses non-literal hard-edge fracture pressure to carry the Taiwan summit story with Trump as a yellow pressure cue, not a replacement subject.
compositionAdaptations: Placed near center and close foreground at 1.5 scale so the black interruption, cyan compression island, yellow cue, and nested stripes remain the readable center of gravity on desktop and mobile.
composition modified non-literal-fracture-pressure from isolated accepted-part defaults
Placed close and central at 1.5 scale to keep the black interruption, cyan compression island, yellow Trump-pressure cue, and nested bands readable in both previews.

workshopAcceptance: Session Playwright preview succeeded for desktop with healthStatus ok and captureStatus ok.

Screenshot previews/attempt-001/001-artist-mark-field-draft-desktop.jpg shows a visibly readable non-enclosing Bryce Hudson style field: large hard-edge red/orange/blue planes, black contour anchors, yellow pressure struts, cropped radial marks, repeated grid cells, and converging contour lines around the central pressure seam.

Render report previews/attempt-001/desktop-render-report.json recorded nonblank render metrics with dynamicRange 226.333, foregroundOccupancyRatio 0.161304, centerCoverageRatio 0.433449, and focalDominanceRatio 0.671788.
evidence.selfReview: Accepted: the authored module carries the artist-style-system role through large matte geometric planes, grid cells, radial symbols, hard-edge cuts, and contour pressure lines while preserving the Taiwan summit news pressure cue.
compositionAdaptations: Shifted to right midground and reduced below the primary scale so it frames, repeats, and pressurizes the central fracture without hiding the main black/cyan/yellow intersection.
composition modified artist-mark-field from isolated accepted-part defaults
Shifted to right midground at 0.82 scale so it braces and repeats the central fracture language without overtaking the primary subject.
